title: Glassbox updates and fixes
summary:
been working on Glassbox a lot lately. finally fixed the classifier checkpoint loading for MLP and CNN models. also made the training process memmap-friendly so it does not crash when memory is low.

there was a bug where the classifier input was inconsistent. i fixed this by flattening x in all evolution call sites. also improved how we do validation splits.

added some new docs for the research roadmap and wrote down my critique of the current architecture. need to clean up more code before the next evaluation.
commitMessages: feat: enhance classifier integration and improve validation split logic
docs: updated research roadmap and added architectural critique documents.
Fix classifier checkpoint loading (MLP/CNN) and make training memmap-friendly
Fix inconsistent classifier input handling across evolution call sites by flattening x in both paths
